original_image_tags: A white page showing a title page for a document. Along the left margin is a vertical column of black squares, indicating binding holes or marks. Centered on the page is typed text.

elements.description: Page containing centered typed text 'UFOs and Defense' and '--The COMETA Report--' with a vertical column of 14 black rectangular punch-hole marks along the left margin. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts are present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains only typed text and vertical binding marks with no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts.
